creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 236588
Patch for neon

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE #0 stable/13-n251817-0c4d13c521a (amd64) (make, make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 12.3-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following users using Poudriere:
audio/libcoverart
audio/libmusicbrainz5
devel/pysvn
misc/far2l
multimedia/audacious-plugins
sysutils/nut
sysutils/nut-devel
www/cadaver
www/gstreamer1-plugins-neon
www/litmus
www/sitecopy
